methods.description: This method measures the size of pollen grains using an ocular micrometer indexed against a stage micrometer in various media.

steps.description: Measure the size of pollen grains with the help of an ocular micrometer indexed against a stage micrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure pollen grain size using ocular micrometer

steps.description: Conduct pollen morphology size measurement in different media: water, acetocarmine, glycerol, and no medium (dry).
steps.searchable_summary: measure pollen size in various media
outputs: pollen size data in different media

methods.description: This method evaluates the effect of different chemicals on pollen germination using a complete randomized block design.

steps.description: Test the effect of different chemicals (sucrose, IAA, IBA, GA3 at 1, 5, and 10 ppm each) on pollen germination.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate chemical effects on pollen germination

steps.description: Replicate the treatment three times in a complete randomized block design.
steps.searchable_summary: replicate treatment in randomized block design

methods.method_name: Light Color Effect on Pollen Germination
methods.description: This method tests the effect of different light colors on pollen germination using a complete randomized block design.

steps.description: Test the effect of different light colors (red, blue, green, violet, and pink) on pollen germination.
steps.searchable_summary: evaluate light color effects on pollen germination

steps.description: Replicate the experiment five times in a complete randomized block design.
steps.searchable_summary: replicate experiment in randomized block design

methods.description: This method quantifies pollen germination by evaluating the percentage of germinated pollen grains.

steps.description: Collect pollen from mature anthers and distribute into germination media in cavity slides.
steps.searchable_summary: collect and distribute pollen into germination media

steps.description: Place slides at room temperature (15±22 ºC) for 12 and 24 hours.
steps.searchable_summary: incubate pollen slides at room temperature

steps.description: Quantify germination as the percentage of germinated pollen grains per 100 evaluated.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate percentage of germinated pollen grains

steps.description: Consider pollen grain germinated when the pollen tube length is greater than the diameter of the pollen grain.
steps.searchable_summary: validate germination by pollen tube length
